creator: danny@dannywarren.com
text:
Reviewing as per bug #193693, I propose we mark this RESOLVED/DUPLICATE of one of the following bugs:

* Bug #177045 - Already covers upgrading mail/dspam to 3.10.2
* Bug #180704 - Your other bug that applies this same functionality to mail/dspam that was already accepted and committed 

Since we are aiming to retire mail/dspam-devel, we no longer need the dspam-devel specific version of this patch.

I'm working on a big patch that merges relevant fixes from the mail/dspam-devel port in to mail/dspam without blowing away any of the good stuff already sitting in mail/dspam - so your fixes there will stay intact.  Thanks!
